name: VR Blade of Blocks
short_description: VR Blade of Blocks is a first-person VR block-cutting game where players take on the role of a swordsman, slicing through various colorful blocks.
detailed_description:
This is a VR simulation game that supports keyboard and mouse, but it is recommended to use VR devices for the best experience. Try to destroy as many blocks as possible with your sword before they collide with you, in order to earn higher scores and break your own record.

Features:

  • Unique combo system where the higher the combo, the more points you earn.

  • Adjust the block generation speed to match your sword-swinging rhythm.

  • Choose from 3 game modes.

  • 3 cool blade designs available for customization.

  • Option to wield the sword with one hand or two, or hold two swords simultaneously.

  • Beautiful background music.

  • Healing-style art design.

supported_languages:
English*, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese*, Korean*
*languages with full audio support
